case_title: LIU, YAN JUAN VS. HON'S WUN-TUN HOUSE (CALIFORNIA) LTD

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, YAN JUAN AS TO DEFENDANT HON'S WUN-TUN HOUSE (CALIFORNIA) LTD A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIU, YAN JUAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HON'S WUN-TUN HOUSE (CALIFORNIA) LTD A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $3,160.17 PRINCIPAL, $6.01 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,391.18, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
